# Grill Me

Interview the user relentlessly about a plan or design until reaching shared understanding, resolving each branch of the decision tree.

| | |
| --- | --- |
| **Owner** | CT AIA FRZ |
| **Version** | 1.0.0 |
| **Category** | Productivity |
| **Requires** | None |
| **Compatible with** | GitHub Copilot, Claude Code |
| **Upstream** | [mattpocock/skills](https://github.com/mattpocock/skills) (MIT) |

## Installation

Download the `grill-me` folder from the [AC Skills Marketplace](../) and place it in your project's skill directory:

| Platform | Scope | Install path |
| --- | --- | --- |
| GitHub Copilot | Project | `.github/skills/grill-me/` |
| GitHub Copilot | Personal | `~/.copilot/skills/grill-me/` |
| Claude Code | Project | `.claude/skills/grill-me/` |
| Claude Code | Personal | `~/.claude/skills/grill-me/` |

For the full skill reference, see [SKILL.md](./SKILL.md).
